overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long ONDS Daily ETF (ONDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Ondas Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ONDS) stock, less fees, and expenses ONDG was launched on Jan 13, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
